sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52173" key="kakodromi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-δρομία</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκο-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52173.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bad passage</tr_> (by sea), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.699</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
